title: Ventas: High Quality At An Attractive Price
text: Ventas is a well-diversified healthcare REIT and is growing its exposure to the emerging life sciences category. It's seeing encouraging improvements to its operating fundamentals and its SHOP portfolio is seeing strong margin growth.

title: The 3 Best REITs to Buy for February 2023
text: The real estate investment trusts (REITs) strong operating performance in 2022 was a welcome sight for real estate investors. The best REITs emerged as the post-pandemic reopening catalyzed positive market conditions.

title: Ventas (VTR) Q4 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Ventas (VTR) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 1.39% and 0.15%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Ventas Reports 2022 Fourth Quarter and Full Year Results and Provides 2023 Outlook
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Ventas, Inc. (NYSE: VTR) (“Ventas” or the “Company”) today reported results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2022. CEO Remarks “We are pleased to have delivered a strong fourth quarter, which reflects the attractive operating and financial results of our diverse portfolio and the benefits of our key strategic initiatives. Accelerating SHOP top- and bottom-line growth fueled outstanding total Company performance in the fourth quarter.

title: Why Earnings Season Could Be Great for Ventas (VTR)
text: Ventas (VTR) is seeing favorable earnings estimate revision activity and has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP heading into earnings season.
